name: John the Baptist
oracleText:
Vigilance
When John the Baptist enters the battlefield, search your library for a basic Plains or Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavorText: "The voice of one crying in the wilderness." — Luke 3:4
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Voice in the Desert" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Voice in the Wilderness

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Voice in the Desert
classics.sourceNotes: This is an exact classics-theme match for John the Baptist’s wilderness proclamation.
